artifacts.name: unit-test-InstancedBricks
artifacts.description: Unit tests for InstancedBricks component: verifies InstancedMesh usage and multi-type grouping (T-FE-PERF-001-01)

artifacts.name: performance-tests
artifacts.description: Performance tests: FPS measurement for 100/500 bricks, and scale test for 1000 bricks (T-FE-PERF-001-02, T-PERF-PERF-001-01, T-PERF-SCALE-001-01)

summary.work_completed: Created missing test suite for FR-PERF-001 (Instanced Mesh Rendering). Added unit tests to verify InstancedMesh usage and e2e performance tests for FPS targets and scalability.
key_findings: Implementation of InstancedBricks already meets the architectural pattern (one InstancedMesh per brick type).
Performance targets (60 FPS for 100 bricks, 30 FPS for 500 bricks) are measurable via Playwright.
Scale test ensures 1000 bricks can be loaded without crash.

human_review_required.reason: Tests must be executed in CI to verify performance thresholds; human approval needed before merge

recommended_actions: Review the PR #39 changes for correctness and completeness.
Ensure CI runs all tests and passes, especially performance thresholds.
Validate that the performance tests meet the defined FPS targets on standard hardware.
If any tests fail, request changes or additional coverage.
